summary: App with payment integration (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) where clicking payment was incorrectly opening WhatsApp instead of the payment apps.
known_issues: Payment button incorrectly opens WhatsApp instead of GPay/PhonePe/Paytm

existing_features.title: Fix the UPI payment deep links in UpiPaymentButtons.tsx and UpiPaymentOptionsModal.tsx so that clicking GPay, PhonePe, and Paytm buttons opens the correct respective payment app (GPay, PhonePe, Paytm) instead of WhatsApp. Use the correct platform-specific UPI URI schemes: 'tez://upi/pay?' for GPay, 'phonepe://pay?' for PhonePe, and 'paytmmp://pay?' for Paytm. Do not change any other UI, layout, or functionality.
